user.description: Sign in with your EZVIZ cloud account. Two-step verification must be disabled.

reauth_confirm.description: The EZVIZ credentials for {username} are no longer valid. Enter the current password to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the EZVIZ cloud.
error.mfa_not_supported: This account has two-step verification enabled, which is not supported. Disable it in the EZVIZ app and try again.

abort.already_configured: This EZVIZ account is already configured.

init.title: EZVIZ Stream options
init.description: Tune how this integration talks to the EZVIZ cloud.

data_description.max_concurrent_snapshots: How many camera thumbnails may refresh from the cloud at the same time. 1 (the default) serialises them, which is safest against EZVIZ rate-limiting; raise it only if a multi-camera dashboard fills too slowly.

options.title: Camera options
options.description: Configure {camera}. If it has Image Encryption enabled, enter its verification code (the 6-character code on the camera label); leave blank otherwise. Saving grabs a frame to check the settings.{camera_note}

data.motion_thumbnail: Use last motion image as thumbnail (recommended for battery cameras)

data_description.motion_thumbnail: Show the camera's most recent cloud motion snapshot instead of grabbing a live frame, so a battery camera is never woken just to fill a thumbnail.
data_description.snapshot_interval: How often a thumbnail that is being viewed refreshes. A longer interval wakes battery cameras less often (only applies when the motion image is off).

reconfigure.title: Camera options
reconfigure.description: Update {camera}. If it has Image Encryption enabled, enter its verification code (the 6-character code on the camera label); leave blank otherwise. Saving grabs a frame to check the settings.

data.motion_thumbnail: Use last motion image as thumbnail (recommended for battery cameras)

data_description.motion_thumbnail: Show the camera's most recent cloud motion snapshot instead of grabbing a live frame, so a battery camera is never woken just to fill a thumbnail.
data_description.snapshot_interval: How often a thumbnail that is being viewed refreshes. A longer interval wakes battery cameras less often (only applies when the motion image is off).

verify_failed.title: Couldn't verify the camera
verify_failed.description: No video frame was received. The verification code may be wrong, or the camera may be asleep or temporarily unreachable. Try again, or save anyway.

abort.no_cameras: All streamable cameras on this account have already been added.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the EZVIZ cloud.
abort.invalid_auth: The account credentials are no longer valid. Reconfigure the account.
